codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior lexer bug by adding explicit malformed-prefix rejection before decimal fallback, tightening valid hex/binary patterns to require at least one real digit, and covering both malformed and preserved-valid underscore cases in the lexer suite. I did not find correctness or regression issues in the scoped change.

summary: Reviewed commit f567fdc330f380499200cc2720a0a18000b47cac for phase-1-fix-malformed-prefixed-integers. The implementation resolves the reported malformed prefixed integer bug and adds focused regression coverage without introducing reviewable issues.
